response.global_analysis: Verified audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for the song 'XY&Z'. I am discarding unused JSON lyrics that extend beyond the clip's duration. Vocal audio is at a high tempo; applying strict anti-cascading rules with aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions. Manually transcribing spoken sections (intro, interlude, and outro) using native audio perception and on-screen text as fallbacks for accuracy.

subtitles.original: こよりは　マヨネーズ　で　回復　した
subtitles.english: Koyori recovered with mayonnaise.

subtitles.original: 助手くんが仲間になった！

subtitles.english: AI Koyori became an ally!

subtitles.original: ヘイ！
subtitles.english: Hey!

subtitles.original: カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
subtitles.english: Like that morning sun shining on Kalos,

subtitles.original: （ニトロチャージ、熱く行こうぜ）
subtitles.english: (Nitro charge, let's go hot!)

subtitles.english: Come on! Let's move forward, we're always ready,

subtitles.original: （型破り、変幻自在で）
subtitles.english: (Unconventional, changing freely!)

subtitles.original: 重なり合う思いが、奇跡を呼び起こす
subtitles.english: Our overlapping feelings will summon a miracle...

subtitles.english: XY&Z!

subtitles.english: Let's go! An intensely burning battle!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！起死回生
subtitles.english: Let's go! A miraculous turnaround,

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: I will never give up!

subtitles.original: ヘイ！たとえどんな壁が道を塞いだって
subtitles.english: Hey! No matter what walls block our path,

subtitles.original: いつでもぶつかって砕けるだけで
subtitles.english: We'll always just smash right through them.

subtitles.original: さあ！この手で勝利の星を掴むんだ
subtitles.english: Come on! I'll grab the star of victory with these hands,

subtitles.original: 折れない不屈の心で
subtitles.english: With an unbreakable, indomitable heart.

subtitles.original: 博衣こより生誕ライブ2026、見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to Hakuikoyori Birthday Live 2026!

subtitles.original: 神ゲーたちの神ゲーソングをいっぱい詰め込んでるの。最後まで楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: I've packed it with god-tier songs from god-tier games. Enjoy until the very end!

subtitles.original: いくぜ！激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Let's go! An intensely burning battle!

subtitles.english: Let's go! A pinch is our chance!

subtitles.english: Let's go! A miraculous turnaround,

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: I will never give up!

subtitles.original: はーい！みんなこんこよー！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hello everyone, Kon-koyo!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ6期生、秘密結社HoloXの頭脳、博衣こよりだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm the brain of Secret Society HoloX, Hololive's 6th Gen, Hakuikoyori!

subtitles.original: 改めて今日は博衣こより生誕ライブ2026にお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Once again, thank you for joining Hakuikoyori Birthday Live 2026 today!

subtitles.original: コメントもいっぱいありがとう！イエーイ！こっ、こよ、見えてるよ、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thanks for all the comments! Yay! I see you, Kok-koyo, thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、ライブの感想やスクショはハッシュタグ #博衣こよ生誕Live2026 をつけてたくさん...
subtitles.english: So, please share your thoughts and screenshots with the hashtag #HakuikoyoriBirthdayLive2026!
